{{CargoRelic
|name=CyberVender Medal
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=Defeat [[Mailbox#CyberVenderian|CyberVenderian]]
|description=CyberVender is the home planet of all vending robots, where the Catbots and Dogbots are engaged in a war. For the sake of their own justice and interests, both factions want to dominate the planet. Hopefully, their strife won't affect the vending robot here!
|fame=17
|art=12
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=30
|ss1=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +20<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss2=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +40<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss3=Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail HP +60<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
}}
